phases.label: Refresh data & recompute signal
phases.detail: scripts/ops/daily.py — pull TECL/VIX/macro, verify manifest, write a fresh signal snapshot, rebuild the viz bundle.

phases.label: Run health checks

phases.detail: No approved strategy ideas are queued. Research was skipped; the app is ready to use.
